question: There are 20 questions in a test. Each correct answer scores 5 points and each wrong answer deducts 2 points. John scored 72 points. How many questions did he answer correctly?
Tom had some money. He spent $15 on food, then gave half of the remainder to his sister. He then spent $20 on a book and had $35 left. How much money did Tom have at first?
A teacher has some pencils. If she gives 5 pencils to each student, she will be short of 8 pencils. If she gives 4 pencils to each student, she will have 12 pencils left. How many students are there?
Find the next number in the pattern: 2, 5, 10, 17, 26, ...
There are chickens and rabbits in a farm. There are 35 heads and 94 legs altogether. How many rabbits are there?
In a class, if each student gets 6 stickers, there will be 10 stickers left. If each student gets 7 stickers, there will be 5 stickers short. How many students are in the class?
Mrs. Tan baked some cookies. She gave half to her neighbours, then ate 3 cookies. She then gave half of the remainder to her children and had 8 cookies left. How many cookies did she bake at first?
